{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Geo SCADA Expert (ClearSCADA) is specialized supervisory control software used to manage and control industrial field devices (RTUs, sensors, actuators) over telemetry networks; it functions as an orchestration/controller layer within industrial IoT deployments. The vulnerability lies in this SCADA application itself, so it maps to the application layer of the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "scada software",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerable product is a Foscam C1 Indoor HD Camera—a purpose-built IoT device whose firmware contains a command-injection flaw in its web interface, impacting the device layer.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is an industrial control system composed of dedicated controller modules deployed in operational technology environments to interface with sensors and actuators. These purpose-built devices are active elements in industrial IoT deployments. The buffer-overflow flaws reside in the firmware/software of the modules themselves, placing the vulnerability at the device layer.",
  "category": "actuators",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is a dedicated access-control management platform that interfaces with networked biometric readers and door controllers—hardware that is purpose-built for IoT physical-security deployments. The vulnerability is in the server application that orchestrates these devices, placing it in the IoT application layer.",
  "category": "access control",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a purpose-built Windows application used to configure/manage Bosch IP cameras, which are IoT devices. As an orchestration/management tool it belongs to the IoT application layer and is itself an active element in an IoT deployment. Therefore the CVE is IoT-specific.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "smart cities iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Proficy HMI/SCADA CIMPLICITY is a purpose-built industrial control and orchestration software that manages field devices in industrial environments, fitting the application layer of the IoT ecosystem. The directory-traversal flaw directly affects this IoT-specific platform, so it is classified as IoT.",
  "category": "scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert and Power SCADA Operation are purpose-built software platforms that manage and monitor industrial power devices and sensors. }

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",

  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{

  "sector": "other"
}

{

}

{

{

{
